mariadb-panache/.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrappe.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.

mariadb-panache/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 11 to Java 17 to target the new JDK version.
mariadb-panache/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; compiling with release 11 would produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or fail if Java 17-specific features are used.

mariadb-panache/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 17.
mariadb-panache/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 17 bytecode, aligning with the property change and preventing potential mismatches.
